overrides_triggered.description: 11 critical-path task(s) have slipped their baseline.
3 task(s) are On Hold: Supplier Notification template, OTK to share D&B creds, Enable D & B App.

data_confidence_notes: No 'Level' column found; used 'Ancestors' as the WBS hierarchy depth instead.
No task-level 'RAG' column found; used 'Schedule Health' as a proxy for task color.
'Variance' column was empty at task level; used 'Variance2' instead (duplicate-column artifact in source file).
'Baseline Start' column was empty at task level; used 'Baseline Start2' instead (duplicate-column artifact in source file).
'Baseline Finish' column was empty at task level; used 'Baseline Finish2' instead (duplicate-column artifact in source file).
Phase/Milestone column is empty; inferring phases from depth-1 task names instead.

overrides_triggered.description: 4 phase(s) are Red, including possibly the active phase.

trends.theme: Inconsistent PM reporting discipline across the portfolio
trends.detail: Zycus - Titan S2P Implementation has 16 logged status comments; Zycus - UniSan S2P Implementation has none on record. Health reporting is only as good as the commentary PMs log week to week.

trends.theme: Schedule drift is accelerating, not stabilizing
trends.detail: On Zycus - Titan S2P Implementation, cumulative average variance has been getting worse over the life of the project rather than flattening out — a sign the delays are compounding rather than being absorbed by float.

trends.theme: Client-side/external dependencies are the dominant blocker type
trends.detail: On-hold items across the portfolio are concentrated in tasks waiting on the client (credentials, sample data, sign-offs) rather than on Zycus-side work: Zycus - Titan S2P Implementation: Supplier Notification template, OTK to share D&B creds.

risks.detail: Zycus - Titan S2P Implementation has 2 distinct owner(s), with the busiest covering 66.7% of tasks — versus 19.1% on Zycus - UniSan S2P Implementation. A single-person dependency is a bus-factor risk on the critical path.

risks.theme: Active phase is blocked, not just historically behind
risks.detail: Zycus - UniSan S2P Implementation's current phase — 'Training Phase I' — is itself flagged Red. This is a live blocker to forward progress, not a legacy variance from an earlier phase.

recommendations: Make weekly status-comment logging a required field across all project plans — several signals (sentiment, blocker context) are unavailable without it.
No project in the current portfolio tracks cost/budget data in its plan. Add a Budget Burn column to the plan template so a true 5-signal RAG (incl. cost) can be produced next cycle.
Introduce a client-readiness checklist at kickoff (credentials, sample data, named approvers) to pull these dependencies earlier, before they sit on the critical path.
